label: Advisor
canonical_questions: What domains do you advise in — and which do you decline?
Roughly how much advisory bandwidth do you have right now?
Who in your network do you most actively vouch for?
What kinds of intros from me would be highest-leverage?
Do you prefer 30-min one-offs or ongoing engagements?
extraction_emphasis: Capture: domains of expertise, current advisory bandwidth, people they vouch for, preferred engagement shape, conflicts to avoid.
